# Purpose
The content describes the copyright and usage terms for a piece of software code. Initially authored by Patrick Powell in 1995, the code can be used for any purpose, provided that the original notice remains intact in all source code distributions. Holger Weiss, who maintains a version of the code as of 2008, allows for free use, modification, and redistribution of his changes. While it is encouraged to send back any additions or fixes to Holger Weiss for potential inclusion in the official version, this is not a requirement. Additionally, maintaining the notice is not mandatory for using or redistributing modified versions of the file.
